Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deft To Testify, To Produce Document At Deposition, To Verify Discovery Responses And For Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Defts
Off Calendar Oct-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: ATTY. NICK T. RECKAS, TEL: 415-464-0913 for plaintiff and moving party;
ATTY. PHIL FOSTER OF TOUR-SARKISSIAN LAW OFFICES, TEl: 415-626-7744 specially appearing for defendant

ARGUED AND THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF GEORGE SISKOS' Motion To Compel Defendant To Testify, To Produce Documents At Deposition, To Verify Discovery Responses And For Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants is granted. Defendant Tsikinis is ordered to testify and produce responsive documents at deposition, and to verify discovery responses. Monetary sanctions DENIED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. NOT REPORTED. (301/AJR)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
